prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for formaldehyde (H₂C=O) were computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (PySCF RKS, density-fit; tier 'standard') in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Mulliken partial charges on the neutral, cation (+1, mult 2), and anion (−1, mult 2) were differenced per atom (finite-difference N±1 approach).

Per-atom results:
- O (atom 1): f⁺ = 0.46814, f⁻ = 0.46742, f⁰ = 0.46778, dual = +0.00071
- C (atom 2): f⁺ = 0.70839, f⁻ = 0.11244, f⁰ = 0.41042, dual = +0.59595
- H (atom 3): f⁺ = −0.08827, f⁻ = 0.21008, f⁰ = 0.06090, dual = −0.29835
- H (atom 4): f⁺ = −0.08826, f⁻ = 0.21006, f⁰ = 0.06090, dual = −0.29832

Most electrophilic site: C (atom 2), f⁺ = 0.70839.
Most nucleophilic site: O (atom 1), f⁻ = 0.46742.

Integrity checks: all three passed (fukui_charge_conservation_f+, fukui_charge_conservation_f−, schema_header). trustworthy = true. No warnings reported. Charge conservation: Σf⁺ = 1.0000, Σf⁻ = 1.0000.
